content:
- Executed task 11 after skeptical plan verification: updated the task plan to Draft 2, changed key decision so HA `contract_stub()` stays infallible with typed literal conninfo, then switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented typed conninfo stack in new `src/pginfo/conninfo.rs` (`PgConnInfo`, `PgSslMode`, `ConnInfoParseError`, strict parser + canonical renderer + tests), expanded `PgConfig` with typed HA-relevant optional fields, and migrated process/HA paths (`PgRewindSpec`, `ProcessDispatchDefaults`, e2e fixture defaults) off raw conninfo strings.
- Fixed fallout across fixtures/tests (`pg_config` struct literals, process real-job test conninfo inputs), resolved one parser test expectation issue, formatted, and validated all required gates sequentially with full pass: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task file acceptance + `<status>done</status> <passes>true</passes> <passing>true</passing>`, wrote a new learning to `AGENTS.md`, ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, and prepared commit with required message format including gate evidence and implementation notes.
- Next engineer: continue from new current task; this task is complete and switched.

- Read prior progress memory and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md for all <passes>/<passing>/<priority> states.
- Confirmed all bug tasks are already passing (no bug-first blocker) and there are multiple non-bug tasks with <passes>false</passes>.
- Applied selection rules: false tasks take precedence over meta-task, avoided low-priority task 16, picked the next logical unblocked verification chain starter.
- Wrote .ralph/current_task.txt with: .ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/01-task-verify-build-and-static-gates.md
- Next agent should execute that task and continue the verification story sequence.

- Started by loading prior memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and read .ralph/current_task.txt; active task is .ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/01-task-verify-build-and-static-gates.md.
- Per user workflow, performed a planning-only pass (no gate execution yet). Ran broad parallel exploration across Makefile, adjacent story-full-verification tasks, task_switch script, add-bug skill rules, and repo marker conventions.
- Added a full <implementation_plan> to the task file with explicit phases: evidence setup, build/static gates first, bug-task creation on failures, full mandatory suite sequencing, transient artifact recovery policy, and completion bookkeeping.
- Appended terminal marker TO BE VERIFIED at end of the task file and intentionally stopped before execution to follow the state-machine instructions.
- Next turn should detect TO BE VERIFIED, run deep skeptical verification with high-parallel exploration (16+ tracks), alter at least one plan decision, and then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Read startup memory, loaded current task path, and found the task file in TO BE VERIFIED state.
- Per workflow, ran a deep skeptical review with high parallel exploration (Makefile, sibling task specs, add-bug skill, task switch semantics, status marker conventions, evidence conventions, and git state).
- Updated the task plan from Draft 1 to Draft 2 with a concrete amendment: removed redundant duplicate check/lint gate runs and defined one canonical serial gate sequence with deterministic evidence capture.
- Switched marker from TO BE VERIFIED to NOW EXECUTE, then executed the plan exactly: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint; all passed.
- Captured logs under .ralph/evidence/story-full-verification/01-task-verify-build-and-static-gates and saved marker grep artifacts for make test/lint with explicit not-found outputs.
- Updated task acceptance checkboxes and status tags to done/passes/passing true, added an execution_report section, and recorded a new learning in AGENTS.md about running explicit make test-bdd for policy evidence.
- Next actions in this turn: run .ralph/task_switch.sh, commit all files including .ralph updates/evidence with required message format, and stop.
